best_for: Brand New Belongings replacement cost coverage
perks: Brand New Belongings pays to replace items at today's prices, not depreciated value
Better Roof Replacement upgrades your roof materials when you file a claim
Home renovation credit for upgrading plumbing, electrical, or HVAC
Multi-policy discount for bundling with auto
Identity theft protection available as add-on
drawbacks: Not available in Alaska, Hawaii, Louisiana, or some coastal areas
Some specialized coverage only available through agents
Premiums above average for high-value homes
